def: Composed of, containing, or resembling, pisolite.
The quality or state of being adverse; opposition.
Sprained in the shoulder, as a horse. Shak.
A consecrateo place; esp., a temple.
The same, or equal, in law or right; one in kind or origin;analogous; similar. Dana.
The tendency to associate in cliques; the spirit of cliques.

An estate settled on a wife, which she is to enjoy afterhusband's decease, for her own life at least, in satisfaction ofdower.The jointure that your king must make, Which with her dowry shall becounterpoised. Shak.
